title: Q+A Salicylic Acid Body Wash (250ml), Sensitive Shower Gel, Body Care, Shower Gel with Green Tea Extract and BHA, Gently Exfoliates, Smoothes, and Softens the skin

features: Clarifying Body Wash for Smoother, Clearer Skin: This 96.5% natural, gel-based body wash gently exfoliates and purifies with blemish-fighting Salicylic Acid. Perfect for oily, stressed, sensitive and normal skin types dealing with texture or body breakouts.
A Body Exfoliator That Go Beyond the Surface: Unclogs pores, smooths rough skin, soothes irritation, and supports hydration for a refreshed, more even-looking complexion.
Clean, Conscious Formula: Vegan friendly and cruelty free. Made in the UK with naturally derived ingredients and a 96.5% natural body wash formula.
How to Use for Best Results: Massage gently into wet skin while showering, then rinse clean. For best results, follow with Q+A Salicylic Acid Smoothing Lotion.

Powerful Ingredients with a Refreshing Scent: With Salicylic Acid to exfoliate and clear pores, White Willow Bark and Green Tea Extract to calm and protect, Aloe Vera to hydrate, and a fresh Watermelon + Agave Nectar scent with notes of Cactus Water and Tropical Fruits.
description: Product Description Salicylic Acid Body Wash Formulated with Salicylic Acid, White Willow Bark, and Green Tea Extract, this gel body wash helps to target blemishes and unwanted skin texture. The expert blend exfoliates dead skin cells whilst smoothing and softening your skin. Previous page Step 1: Lather a coin sized amount with water. Step 2: Massage gently into wet skin, paying attention to texture and blemishes. Rinse clean with water. Step 3: Can be used morning or night, suitable for daily use. Perfect Pairing For best results, follow with Q+A Salicylic Acid Smoothing Lotion What Scent? With Watermelon + Agave Nectar Scent. Our all new Bodycare range! Merchant video Explore the Q+A Bodycare Range.... Salicylic Acid Lotion AHA Exfoliator Body Scrub Hyaluronic Acid Body Wash Skin type? Best for oily, blemish-prone skin Skin type? Best for textured, bumpy skin Skin type? Best for dry, dehydrated skin Key benefits? Targets blemishes and pores Key benefits? Smooths rough or bumpy patches Key benefits? Hydrates, nourishes, and soothes Vegan? Yes Vegan? Yes Vegan? Yes Q+A Salicylic Acid Body Wash Salicylic Acid is a BHA that exfoliates the skin, targeting blemishes that arise from the build-up of dead skin and excess oil. This gel-based Body Wash works to gently exfoliate, smooth and soften the skin thanks to an expert blend of Salicylic Acid, White Willow Bark and Green Tea Extract. It’s the perfect product for those prone to ‘backne’ and unwanted skin texture. The sugary and fresh Watermelon + Agave Nectar scent is perfect for daily cleansing, combined with notes of Cactus Water, Orchid and Tropical Fruits. 96.5% Natural Formula – Cruelty-free – Alcohol-free – Dermatologically Tested – Vegan-friendly How & When to Use: Lather a coin sized amount with water. Massage gently into wet skin to wash, paying particular attention to areas of texture and blemishes. Rinse clean with water. Can be used morning or night, suitable for daily use. For best results, follow with Q+A Salicylic Acid Smoothing Lotion. Key Ingredients: Salicylic Acid - This Beta-Hydroxy Acid exfoliates the skin by renewing and replenishing. Its small molecular size allows it to penetrate deeper into pores, to target incoming blemishes. It helps to improve overall skin texture and brighten the skin. Aloe Vera - Aloe Vera is rich in polysaccharides, a molecule that hydrates the skin. This skin soothing ingredient works in harmony with Salicylic Acid to calm the skin. It’s bursting with vitamins, minerals and antioxidants. Green Tea Extract - Green Tea is a powerful, natural antioxidant with skin-calming capabilities. The EGCG antioxidant found in Green Tea helps to rejuvenate. Our chemists make the Q+A Green Tea Extract in house. White Willow Bark Extract - The bark of the White Willow Tree contains Salicin, a plant compound that has similar capabilities to Salicylic Acid! Traditionally, this ingredient was used to soothe and calm stressed-out skin. Product Information: 250ml. Made in the UK. This product is suitable for vegans. Q+A products are not tested on animals, and never will be.
